scripts.visuals: npm run visual-maps:build && sh -c 'cd docs/visual-maps/dist && (sleep 1; open http://127.0.0.1:4184) & python3 -m http.server 4184 --bind 127.0.0.1'
scripts.visual-maps:build: sh -c 'mkdir -p docs/visual-maps/archive && if [ -d docs/visual-maps/dist ]; then mv docs/visual-maps/dist docs/visual-maps/archive/dist-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S); fi; likec4 build docs/visual-maps --output docs/visual-maps/dist --base ./'
